flows: utente -> devices — type=associazione; label="utilizza"; explanation="user associates with devices"
devices -> config — type=associazione; label="configura"; explanation="devices are configured by config"
devices -> alert — type=segnala; label="segnala"; explanation="devices signal events to alert"
alert -> history — type=segnala; label="registra"; explanation="alert records events in history"
utente.creautente(string, string, bool) -> utente
utente.checkpassword(string, string, bool) -> utente
utente.resetpassword(string, bool) -> utente
utente.getutenteinfo() -> utente
devices.getdeviceinfo() -> devices
devices.configura(config) -> devices
devices.segnala(alert) -> alert
alert.registra(history) -> history
the diagram models a system with user accounts, devices, configuration settings, alerts, and a history of events.
users can create accounts, check passwords, and reset passwords.
devices can be configured and report events.
alerts are recorded in a history.
"accesso eseguito" -> "click 'serre'" — type=transition; label="click"; explanation="user clicks 'serre'"
"click 'serre'" -> "visualizzazione elenco serre" — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if at least 1 serre is associated"
"accesso eseguito" -> "visualizzazione messaggio default" — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if no serre is associated"
the diagram models the flow of a user accessing a "serre" feature.
the system checks if there are any associated "serre".
if there are, the user is shown a list of the "serre".
if there are no associated "serre", a default message is displayed.
accesso eseguito -> valore errato — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="incorrect value"
accesso eseguito -> campo inserito correttamente — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="correct value"
valore errato -> campo inserito correttamente — type=transition; label="campo inserito correttamente"
accesso eseguito -> valore errato
accesso eseguito -> campo inserito correttamente
the diagram models the process of adding a device.
the process starts with an access attempt.
if the value entered is incorrect, the process branches to a state where the user is prompted to enter the value correctly.
if the value entered is correct, the process proceeds to an operation execution state.
accesso eseguito -> serra connessa — transition="yes"; explanation="successful connection";
accesso eseguito -> valore errato — transition="no"; explanation="incorrect value";
serra connessa -> click "configuration" — transition="yes"; explanation="click configuration";
click "configuration" -> campi inseriti correttamente — transition="yes"; explanation="fields entered correctly";
click "configuration" -> valore errato — transition="no"; explanation="incorrect value";
campi inseriti correttamente -> operazione eseguita — transition="yes"; explanation="operation executed";
valore errato -> accesso eseguito — transition="no"; explanation="return to access";

the diagram models the process of accessing a server, connecting to it, clicking a configuration button, and either successfully entering the correct values or encountering an error. the process loops back to the initial access if the values are incorrect.
validations: valore errato -> campo inserito correttamente — condition="campo inserito correttamente"

pages.uml_type:
class
- Utente — kind=class; attributes=[id: String, nomeCognome: String, email: String]; operations=[creaUtente(String, String, bool), checkPassword(String, String, bool), resetPassword(String, bool), getUtenteInfo(): List<String>]; role=User
- Devices — kind=class; attributes=[id: String, titolo: String]; operations=[getDeviceInfo(): List<String>]; role=Device
- Config — kind=class; attributes=[isConnected: bool, light: bool, water: bool, max_temp: float, min_temp: float, max_soil_hum: float, min_soil_hum: float, max_air_hum: float, min_air_hum: float, max_lum: float, min_lum: float, max_jum: float, min_jum: float]; operations=[getConfig(): List<String>, setConfig(List<String>, bool)]; role=Configuration
- Alert — kind=class; attributes=[message: String]; operations=[getMessage(): String, updateMessage(String)]; role=AlertMessage
- History — kind=class; attributes=[data: String]; operations=[getHistory(): List<String>, updateHistory(String, float, float, float)]; role=HistoryRecord
